info.name: Prbal API for Services
info.description: API collection for the Prbal application, generated from Prbal-API.md. Covers user types: providers, customers, and admins.

item.name: Services & Service Requests
Public Service & Category Endpoints

request.description:
Retrieves a list of all service categories. Publicly accessible.

**Permissions:** Public

**Query Parameters:**
- `is_active` (boolean): Filter by active status (e.g., `?is_active=true`).
- `search` (string): Search term for `name` and `description` fields.
- `ordering` (string): Field to order by. Options: `name`, `-name`, `created_at`, `-created_at`.

response.name: Success - List of Service Categories (200 OK)
response.body:
[
    {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Home Repairs",
        "description": "Services related to home repair and maintenance.",
        "icon": "fas fa-tools",
        "is_active": true,
        "created_at": "2023-10-01T10:00:00Z",
        "updated_at": "2023-10-01T10:00:00Z",
        "slug": "home-repairs"
    },
    {
        "id": 2,
        "name": "Gardening",
        "description": "Gardening and landscaping services.",
        "icon": "fas fa-leaf",
        "is_active": true,
        "created_at": "2023-10-02T11:00:00Z",
        "updated_at": "2023-10-02T11:00:00Z",
        "slug": "gardening"
    }
]

response.name: Error - Internal Server Error (500)

variable.description: (string) The slug of the service category (e.g., `home-repairs`).

request.description:
Retrieves a specific service category by its slug. Publicly accessible.

**Permissions:** Public

**Path Variables:**
- `slug` (string, required): The slug of the service category to retrieve.

response.name: Success - Service Category Details (200 OK)
response.body:
{
    "id": 1,

    "created_at": "2023-10-01T10:00:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2023-10-01T10:00:00Z",
    "slug": "home-repairs"
}

response.name: Error - Not Found (404)

request.description:
Creates a new service category. Requires Admin privileges.

**Permissions:** Admin (`IsAuthenticated`, `IsAdminUser`)

**Request Body:**
- `name` (string, required): Name of the category.
- `description` (string, optional): Description of the category.
- `icon` (string, optional): Icon class for the category (e.g., Font Awesome).
- `is_active` (boolean, optional, default: true): Whether the category is active.

exec: pm.test("Response contains created category details", function () {
pm.expect(jsonData.is_active).to.eql(true, "is_active should default to true if not in request");

response.name: Success - Category Created (201 Created)
response.body:
{
    "id": "cat_01HNEWCATIDEXMPL",
    "name": "Gardening Services",
    "slug": "gardening-services",
    "description": "All kinds of gardening and lawn care services.",
    "icon": "fas fa-leaf",
    "is_active": true,
    "created_at": "2023-10-26T10:00:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2023-10-26T10:00:00Z"
}

response.name: Error - Validation Error (400 Bad Request)
Error - Unauthorized (401)
Error - Forbidden (403)

header.description: Access token for a non-admin user (e.g., customer or provider).

variable.description: (string) The ID or slug of the service category to update (e.g., `home-repairs` or `cat_01HNEWCATIDEXMPL`).

request.description:
Updates an existing service category by its ID or slug. Requires Admin privileges. All fields are optional for update, but at least one must be provided.

**Permissions:** Admin (`IsAuthenticated`, `IsAdminUser`)

**Path Variables:**
- `service_category_id_or_slug` (string, required): The ID or slug of the service category to update.

**Request Body:** (All fields optional)
- `name` (string): New name of the category.
- `description` (string): New description of the category.
- `icon` (string): New icon class for the category.
- `is_active` (boolean): New active status.

exec: pm.test("Response contains updated category details", function () {

response.name: Success - Category Updated (200 OK)
response.body:
{
    "id": "cat_01HNEWCATIDEXMPL",
    "name": "Updated Home Services",
    "slug": "updated-home-services",
    "description": "Comprehensive home services including repairs, maintenance, and installations.",
    "icon": "fas fa-home-alt",
    "is_active": true,
    "created_at": "2023-10-01T10:00:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2023-10-26T11:00:00Z"
}

response.name: Error - Validation Error (400 Bad Request)

variable.description: (string) The ID or slug of the service category to partially update (e.g., `home-repairs` or `cat_01HNEWCATIDEXMPL`).

request.description:
Partially updates an existing service category by its ID or slug. Requires Admin privileges. Only provided fields will be updated.

**Permissions:** Admin (`IsAuthenticated`, `IsAdminUser`)

**Path Variables:**
- `service_category_id_or_slug` (string, required): The ID or slug of the service category to update.

**Request Body:** (All fields optional, provide only fields to update)
- `name` (string): New name of the category.
- `description` (string): New description of the category.
- `icon` (string): New icon class for the category.
- `is_active` (boolean): New active status.

exec: pm.test("Response body is a valid JSON", function () {
pm.test("Response has id, slug, created_at, updated_at", function () {
// Check fields that were sent in the PATCH request
pm.test("Response 'name' matches request if provided", function () {
pm.test("Response 'description' matches request if provided", function () {
pm.test("Response 'icon' matches request if provided", function () {
pm.test("Response 'is_active' matches request if provided", function () {

request.description:
Retrieves a list of all service subcategories. Publicly accessible. Can be filtered by `category_id` or `category_slug`.

**Permissions:** Public

**Query Parameters:**
- `category_id` (integer): Filter by parent category ID.
- `category_slug` (string): Filter by parent category slug.
- `is_active` (boolean): Filter by active status.
- `search` (string): Search term.
- `ordering` (string): Field to order by.

exec: pm.test("Response is a valid JSON array", function () {
pm.test("Each subcategory in the array has required fields", function () {

request.description:
Creates a new service subcategory. 

**Permissions:** Admin User (Requires `is_staff` or `is_superuser` to be true).

**Important:** Replace `{{service_category_id_for_subcategory_example}}` in the request body with an actual ID of an existing service category (e.g., `1`, `2`).

**Request Body Fields:**
- `category` (integer, **required**): ID of the parent service category.
- `name` (string, **required**): Name of the subcategory.
- `description` (string, optional): Description of the subcategory.
- `icon` (string, optional): Icon class (e.g., Font Awesome) or URL for the subcategory.
- `is_active` (boolean, optional, default: `true`): Whether the subcategory is active.

response.name: Success - Subcategory Created (201 Created)

body.raw:
{
    "category": 2, 
    "name": "Faucet Repair",
    "description": "Repair and replacement of leaky faucets.",
    "icon": "fas fa-faucet",
    "is_active": true
}

response.body:

    "id": {{new_service_subcategory_id_example}},

variable.description: (string): The slug of the subcategory to update (e.g., `faucet-repair`).

request.description:
Updates an existing service subcategory. Requires all fields to be provided.

**Permissions:** Admin User (Requires `is_staff` or `is_superuser` to be true).

**Important:** Replace `{{service_subcategory_slug_to_update}}` in the URL with the slug of an actual subcategory to update. Replace `{{service_category_id_for_subcategory_example}}` in the request body with an actual ID of an existing service category.

**Path Variables:**
- `slug`: The slug of the service subcategory to update.

**Request Body Fields (all required for PUT):**
- `category` (integer): ID of the parent service category.
- `name` (string): Name of the subcategory.
- `description` (string): Description of the subcategory.
- `icon` (string): Icon class or URL for the subcategory.
- `is_active` (boolean): Whether the subcategory is active.

response.name: Success - Subcategory Updated (200 OK)

    "category": 2,
    "name": "Updated Faucet Repair Service",
    "description": "Comprehensive repair and replacement of all types of faucets, updated.",
    "icon": "fas fa-wrench",
    "is_active": true
}

variable.description: (string): The slug of the subcategory to partially update (e.g., `faucet-repair`).

request.description:
Partially updates an existing service subcategory. Only the fields provided in the request body will be updated.

**Permissions:** Admin User (Requires `is_staff` or `is_superuser` to be true).

**Important:** Replace `{{service_subcategory_slug_to_update}}` in the URL with the slug of an actual subcategory to update.

**Path Variables:**
- `slug`: The slug of the service subcategory to update.

**Request Body Fields (any subset of the following):**
- `category` (integer, optional): ID of the parent service category.
- `name` (string, optional): Name of the subcategory.
- `description` (string, optional): Description of the subcategory.
- `icon` (string, optional): Icon class or URL for the subcategory.
- `is_active` (boolean, optional): Whether the subcategory is active.

query.description: (string, optional) Search term for service name or description.

request.description:
Retrieves a list of services. Publicly accessible.

**Permissions:** Public

**Query Parameters:**
- `category_slug` (string, optional): Filter by category slug.
- `subcategory_slug` (string, optional): Filter by subcategory slug.
- `provider_id` (integer, optional): Filter by provider ID.
- `is_active` (boolean, optional): Filter by active status (true/false).
- `search` (string, optional): Search term across service name and description.
- `ordering` (string, optional): Field to order results by (e.g., `name`, `-created_at`).

response.name: Success - List of Services (200 OK)

request.description:
Creates a new service. 

**Permissions:** Admin User (Requires `is_staff` or `is_superuser` to be true).

**Request Body:**
- `provider` (integer, required): ID of the service provider.
- `category` (string/integer, required): Slug or ID of the service category.
- `subcategory` (string/integer, required): Slug or ID of the service subcategory.
- `name` (string, required): Name of the service.
- `description` (string, optional): Detailed description of the service.
- `price_type` (string, required): Enum: `fixed`, `hourly`, `per_unit`, `negotiable`, `free`.
- `price` (decimal string, optional): Price of the service. Required if `price_type` is not `free` or `negotiable`.
- `price_currency` (string, optional): Currency code (e.g., `USD`). Defaults to system default if not provided.
- `duration_minutes` (integer, optional): Estimated duration of the service in minutes.
- `location_type` (string, required): Enum: `provider_address`, `customer_address`, `online`.
- `location_details` (string, optional): Specifics about the location (e.g., address, URL).
- `is_active` (boolean, optional, default: `true`): Whether the service is active.

response.name: Success - Service Created (201 Created)

variable.description: (string) Slug of the service to update.

request.description:
Updates an existing service by its slug. Requires all fields for a full update (PUT).

**Permissions:** Admin User (Requires `is_staff` or `is_superuser` to be true).

**Path Variables:**
- `service_slug_to_update` (string, required): The slug of the service to update.

**Request Body:** (All fields are typically required for PUT, or should match the model structure)
- `provider` (integer, required): ID of the service provider.
- `category` (string/integer, required): Slug or ID of the service category.
- `subcategory` (string/integer, required): Slug or ID of the service subcategory.
- `name` (string, required): Name of the service.
- `description` (string, optional): Detailed description of the service.
- `price_type` (string, required): Enum: `fixed`, `hourly`, `per_unit`, `negotiable`, `free`.
- `price` (decimal string, optional): Price of the service.
- `price_currency` (string, optional): Currency code.
- `duration_minutes` (integer, optional): Estimated duration.
- `location_type` (string, required): Enum: `provider_address`, `customer_address`, `online`.
- `location_details` (string, optional): Location specifics.
- `is_active` (boolean, optional): Active status.

response.name: Success - Service Updated (200 OK)

body.raw:
{
    "provider": 1,
    "category": "home-repairs-updated",
    "subcategory": "plumbing-updated",
    "name": "Updated Faucet Installation Service",
    "description": "Comprehensive updated installation of all types of new faucets and fixtures.",
    "price_type": "fixed",
    "price": "130.00",
    "price_currency": "USD",
    "duration_minutes": 100,
    "location_type": "customer_address",
    "location_details": "Client's updated specified address",
    "is_active": true
}

response.body:
{

variable.description: (string) Slug of the service to partially update.

request.description:
Partially updates an existing service by its slug. Only include the fields to be updated.

**Permissions:** Admin User (Requires `is_staff` or `is_superuser` to be true).

**Path Variables:**
- `service_slug_to_patch` (string, required): The slug of the service to update.

**Request Body:** (Include only fields to be updated)
- `provider` (integer, optional): ID of the service provider.
- `category` (string/integer, optional): Slug or ID of the service category.
- `subcategory` (string/integer, optional): Slug or ID of the service subcategory.
- `name` (string, optional): Name of the service.
- `description` (string, optional): Detailed description of the service.
- `price_type` (string, optional): Enum: `fixed`, `hourly`, `per_unit`, `negotiable`, `free`.
- `price` (decimal string, optional): Price of the service.
- `price_currency` (string, optional): Currency code.
- `duration_minutes` (integer, optional): Estimated duration.
- `location_type` (string, optional): Enum: `provider_address`, `customer_address`, `online`.
- `location_details` (string, optional): Location specifics.
- `is_active` (boolean, optional): Active status.

response.name: Success - Service Partially Updated (200 OK)
